projectDescription: The official HashiCorp Homebrew tap that distributes signed, official binaries for HashiCorp products on macOS and Linux via Homebrew.
keyFeatures: Official HashiCorp-maintained Homebrew tap with signed binaries
Support for macOS (Intel and Apple Silicon) and Linux (amd64, arm, arm64)
Automated formula updates triggered by AWS Lambda on new releases
Support for both Homebrew Formulae (CLI tools) and Casks (GUI apps)
Enterprise product support alongside open-source versions
Go-based formula templater for generating Ruby formula/cask files
publicApiSurface: Formula products: vault, consul, terraform, nomad, boundary, packer, waypoint, sentinel, hcp, hcdiag, hc-install, levant, nomad-pack, consul-template, consul-terraform-sync, consul-dataplane, consul-k8s, consul-esm, consul-aws, envconsul, vlt, vault-radar, tf-migrate, tfstacks, terraform-ls
Enterprise formulae: vault-enterprise, consul-enterprise, nomad-enterprise, boundary-enterprise
